_comment: Full KNX toolchain. Layer 1 (live HA) is optional and only needed once the house is running. Layers 2-4 are the design-time core. macOS path for Claude Desktop config: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json. For Claude Code, put the mcpServers block in .mcp.json at your project root.

home-assistant._comment: Optional live layer. Official HA MCP Server add-on exposes an SSE endpoint; point an SSE-capable client at http://HA_HOST:8123/mcp_server/sse with a long-lived token. Replace below with your client's SSE config if it differs.
